title: Seawater Portal
bodyHtml:
The Seawater Portal is a network of local community websites across Canada, designed and developed to provide seamless access to news, weather updates, and live radio streaming. Sites such as Steinbach Online, Discover Moose Jaw, Discover Airdrie, CochraneNow, and West Central Online share a consistent layout to ensure a unified user experience while incorporating region-specific branding, including local logos and color schemes, to reflect each community’s identity. This balance of standardization and localization enhances both content management efficiency and user familiarity, making navigation intuitive and engaging.

Built with a focus on performance optimization, the Seawater Portal delivers fast load times, full responsiveness across all devices, and a modern design centered on clarity and accessibility. The streamlined interface ensures quick access to essential information, while the development process prioritizes scalability and reliability. By maintaining a cohesive yet adaptable structure, the platform supports Golden West’s mission to strengthen local engagement through digital media, offering communities a reliable and user-friendly online hub.

title: Podcastville
bodyHtml: Podcastville was designed and developed with a user-centric approach, ensuring seamless navigation and accessibility across all devices. The modern, high-contrast UI enhances readability, while a structured layout guides users effortlessly. The development prioritized performance optimization, fast load times, and responsiveness, adapting fluidly across different screen sizes. Key features include podcast hosting, episode management, and creator tools for branding and marketing, with robust search functionality and third-party platform integration for easy distribution. Every design and development decision was made to streamline content consumption and creation, making Podcastville an engaging hub for both listeners and creators.

title: LAKAI ON
bodyHtml: Lakai ON seamlessly blends fitness tracking with an engaging shopping experience, designed for intuitive and efficient interactions. The minimalist dark theme with vibrant accents enhances readability while reinforcing brand identity. Users can easily track their runs, earn points, and redeem them for products, with a smooth navigation flow, high-quality visuals, and a streamlined checkout process. Micro-interactions and subtle animations create a responsive and immersive feel, while exclusive content like team rider updates strengthens brand engagement. Every UX/UI decision enhances usability and encourages user interaction, making movement, rewards, and shopping feel like one connected journey.

title: Homefield
bodyHtml: This website was designed and developed to provide a seamless and user-friendly experience across all devices. Homefield is an agency that operates alongside the trusted Golden West brand, deeply rooted in local communities. With a diverse team specializing in marketing solutions and people & strategy services, Homefield offers expertise in areas such as brand strategy, marketing strategy, website development, video and photography, display ads, SEO, logo design, media planning and buying, reputation building, and social media management. The website features intuitive navigation, allowing users to explore the company’s history, meet the team, and learn about the comprehensive services offered. An efficient search function ensures visitors can quickly find relevant information, enhancing their understanding of how Homefield can support their business and organizational development needs.

title: Langill Farm
bodyHtml: This website was designed and developed to provide a seamless and user-friendly experience across all devices. Langill Farm is a new age-in-place concept subdivision located in Steinbach, Manitoba, offering a variety of residential homes designed to promote an active, community-focused lifestyle. Conveniently situated steps from Clearspring Centre, residents have easy access to stores and other amenities. Future plans include townhomes, multifamily residences, and commercial spaces, creating a vibrant, inclusive community. The website features intuitive navigation, allowing users to explore available listings, learn about amenities such as walking paths, dog parks, and playgrounds, and connect with preferred builders and agents. An efficient search function ensures visitors can quickly find the information they need to make informed decisions about their future home.

title: Worldwide Oilfield
bodyHtml: This website was designed and developed to provide a seamless and user-friendly experience across all devices. Worldwide Oilfield Sales specializes in selling and shipping used oil equipment and decommissioned drilling rigs to oil companies globally. Their inventory includes refurbished oil rigs and a variety of used drilling equipment such as motors, generators, pipes, and hooks. In partnership with Fast Trucking Service, they ensure efficient transportation of purchased rigs to any location worldwide. The website offers intuitive navigation, allowing users to easily explore available equipment, learn about the company’s commitment to quality and honesty, and contact them for inquiries. An efficient search function enables quick access to relevant information, ensuring a smooth user experience.

title: Saskatoon Zoo Society
bodyHtml: This website was designed and developed to provide a seamless and user-friendly experience across all devices. The Saskatoon Zoo Society, a non-profit charity operating out of the Saskatoon Forestry Farm Park and Zoo, is dedicated to fostering respect for nature through environmental education. The website offers comprehensive information on various educational programs, including on-site “Edzoocation,” virtual sessions, public programs, self-guided tours, and the Young Naturalists initiative. Users can easily navigate to learn about upcoming camps, birthday party options, membership benefits, and opportunities to support the society through donations or volunteering. An intuitive search function ensures visitors can quickly find the information they need to engage with the society’s offerings and participate in fostering environmental stewardship.

title: Pioneer Co-op
bodyHtml: This website was designed and developed to provide a seamless and user-friendly experience across all devices. Pioneer Co-op has proudly served Southwest Saskatchewan for over 86 years, remaining deeply invested in the local community. As a member-driven organization, all earnings are reinvested back into the region, creating sustainable value and long-term profitability for its members. The website allows users to easily explore membership benefits, stay updated on community initiatives, and access essential services through an intuitive navigation and search system.

title: Audra Reinhardt
bodyHtml: This website was designed and developed to provide a seamless and intuitive experience across all devices. It showcases the dedication and professionalism of a REALTORⓇ committed to helping clients achieve their real estate goals. By asking the right questions, solving problems, and removing obstacles, the focus remains on delivering the best possible outcome. Integrity, honesty, and ethical representation are at the core of every interaction. The website features easy navigation, searchable listings, and informative content, ensuring users can effortlessly find the resources they need to make informed decisions.

title: South Sask Bus Lines
bodyHtml: This website was designed and developed to ensure a seamless experience across all devices. South Sask Bus Lines, a family-run business since 2013, has grown to serve communities across southern Saskatchewan and Alberta. Offering trips across North America—from Disneyland to Niagara Falls, Canada’s Wonderland, the Maritimes, and Alaska—services also include transportation for major sporting events like Blue Jays games in Seattle and Minneapolis. Private charter services are available for schools, corporate groups, and local sports teams, including a proud partnership with the Moose Jaw Warriors. With convenient search and navigation features, users can easily explore available trips, book transportation, and stay updated on upcoming events.

title: South Eastevent Centre
bodyHtml: This website, designed and developed by a full-stack web developer, ensures seamless accessibility across all devices. The Steinbach Multiplex is a collaborative initiative between the City of Steinbach, Southeast Events Group, and the joint Provincial and Federal governments through the Investing in Canada Infrastructure program. Initially proposed in 2019, this state-of-the-art event center enhances downtown vibrancy and provides essential infrastructure while serving as a premier multi-use venue for Southeast Manitoba and beyond. The website allows users to easily explore event details, browse various posts, and quickly find information through an intuitive search function, ensuring a smooth and engaging user experience.

title: Art Magic
bodyHtml: This website, designed and developed by a full-stack web developer, is fully optimized for all devices to provide a seamless user experience. Since 1973, AMC has been a leader in woodworking products and services, offering architectural millwork, wood veneer and laminate casework, restoration, rough carpentry, and construction for major commercial and institutional projects across Southern Ontario and beyond. In 2017, AMC expanded with a Manitoba office to serve Western and Central Canada, as well as the USA. The website enables users to explore detailed posts about AMC’s services and projects, with an efficient search function for quick access to relevant information, ensuring both accessibility and usability for all visitors.

title: Family Service Saskatoon
bodyHtml: This website was designed and developed with a responsive, user-friendly approach by a full-stack web developer to ensure optimal performance across all devices. It features a streamlined interface that allows users to easily explore and access Family Service Saskatoon’s services, including counselling, family violence prevention, and therapeutic group sessions. Visitors can find detailed posts about available programs and resources, with a robust search function to quickly locate relevant information. The platform supports Family Service Saskatoon’s mission by providing an organized, accessible space for individuals, couples, families, and youth to seek support and guidance.

title: Nu Era Seeds LTD
bodyHtml: Nu Era Seeds, founded in 2012 by Jeff and Melinda Harder, is a small, privately-owned business dedicated to supporting both small and large farmers in their community. Initially selling soybeans, they have expanded their offerings to include various seeds, fertilizers, livestock feed, pet food, and soil amenities. Committed to excellent customer service, Nu Era Seeds collaborates with top agronomy suppliers. They provide reasonably priced delivery within a 1-hour radius of Gladstone and offer financing options through Scotiabank. Customers can contact them for delivery, equipment rentals, and agronomy advice.

title: Prairie Cricket Farms
bodyHtml: Ryan and Lesley started a cricket farm after learning about crickets as a high-protein food source. What began as a small basement operation has grown into a large-scale facility producing nutrient-dense cricket products that promote gut health and sustainability. The whole family now uses and promotes crickets in various recipes, highlighting their benefits for both health and the environment. Lesley integrates the farm with her wellness business, advocating the power of natural nutrition to support mental health. Together, they are passionate about sharing why crickets are a superfood worth trying.

title: Strong Terra
bodyHtml:
About Us
Founded in 2021, Earthstrong Canada offers cutting-edge technologies to enhance plant nutrition.
Earthstrong Canada is a subsidiary of Floratine Products Group, an innovator in foliar and soil nutrition in the turf, ornamental and specialty agriculture spaces for more than 30 years. Earthstrong Canada’s mission is to build on those unique nutrition technologies to bring Agricultural producers in Canada time-tested science-based solutions. Earthstrong Canada’s targeted approach will address crop production in four unique product offerings:

Solumetrix™ / Harbor™ Nutrients / Soil Amendments / Bio Stimulants

title: The Strong Badger
bodyHtml:
Cozy atmosphere in the vibrant West End in Winnipeg, MB, Canada.

I had a goal of bringing a responsive website with a concise brand identity and a user-friendly news board to life with a fantastical identity. I created a visual experience where visitors can explore The Strong Badgers’ story and vision.

title: KITA
bodyHtml:
The Korea International Trade Association(KITA) was established in 1946 to advance the Korean economy through international trade. The company is currently the largest business organization in Korea with over 70,000 member companies. Representing the interests of Korea’s global traders, KITA serves a diverse range of roles.

It was critical for this project to maintain its current brand identities in color, iconography, and image. I was successful in creating a new website and set of icons that seamlessly follow their already set company identity.

title: Moon’s Design Process
bodyHtml:
Delivering quality work requires dedication, precision, and a deep understanding of both aesthetics and functionality. Every project I undertake is approached with a meticulous design philosophy, ensuring that each element serves a purpose and contributes to an engaging user experience. Even under tight deadlines, I maintain a commitment to excellence by refining every detail while balancing efficiency and creativity.

From initial concept to final execution, my process is structured yet adaptable. It begins with thorough research and strategy development, ensuring that each design aligns with the client’s vision and user needs. Through iterative refinement and strategic problem-solving, I craft solutions that are both visually compelling and functionally seamless. By integrating industry best practices with a user-centered approach, I ensure every project is not only aesthetically strong but also intuitive and effective.

This is a comprehensive look into my design methodology—a creative workflow that transforms ideas into impactful digital experiences. From brainstorming and wireframing to prototyping and final implementation, each stage is a testament to my dedication to producing high-quality work.

title: The Forth
bodyHtml:
Forth Café’s website was crafted from the ground up, ensuring a seamless digital presence that reflects the café’s modern and inviting atmosphere. From initial concept discussions to final implementation, I worked closely with the client, handling every stage of the project—including communication, design, and development.

The design approach was carefully tailored to match the café’s aesthetic, incorporating a modern, minimalist style that resonates with its cozy yet contemporary ambiance. The visual elements, typography, and color scheme were all selected to create a warm and welcoming experience while maintaining a clean, sophisticated look.

Beyond design, I implemented a fully responsive and intuitive web experience, optimizing usability across devices. The development process focused on performance, accessibility, and ease of content management, ensuring the client can effortlessly update the website as needed. The result is a digital platform that not only enhances Forth Café’s brand but also provides a seamless user experience for visitors looking to explore its offerings.

title: Neo Smartpen
bodyHtml:
Neo Smartpen introduced an innovative concept—capturing handwritten notes in real-time and seamlessly storing them on smart devices. This breakthrough technology bridged the gap between the analog and digital worlds, providing a new level of convenience for users, particularly professionals in the creative industry. At the time, this was a cutting-edge solution that transformed traditional note-taking into an interactive digital experience.

During the development of Neo Smartpen’s first-ever mobile application and website, I collaborated closely with the client, ensuring that the design and brand identity aligned with their vision. This period marked a significant growth phase for the company, where the emphasis on creativity played a critical role in defining their market presence. The brand identity was carefully crafted to resonate with early adopters in the art and design industry, making the product stand out in a highly competitive market.

The application was among the first to incorporate transparent 3D polygons in the background, adding a modern and dynamic aesthetic. The use of pentagonal elements further reinforced a unique and memorable product identity. In designing the logo, I applied the golden ratio, creating a composition that felt organic and visually harmonious. Moreover, I implemented customizable UI elements, allowing users to personalize their experience and engage with the technology in a more intuitive way.

By combining design innovation with cutting-edge technology, this project set the foundation for Neo Smartpen’s digital transformation, establishing them as a leading brand in the smart stationery market.

title: TDS Law
bodyHtml:
At Thompson Dorfman Sweatman LLP (TDS), a prominent law firm based in Winnipeg, MB, collaboration is at the core of their professional service. The firm’s website needed a strategic redesign to enhance its brand identity and optimize the user experience across all devices.

The project focused on establishing a cohesive visual identity, integrating their signature purple color palette, hexagonal design elements, and minimalist line icons to reinforce brand recognition. Additionally, the site architecture was restructured to improve information hierarchy, ensuring intuitive navigation and seamless access to legal resources for users on any screen size.

Beyond the initial design and development, I was also responsible for ongoing site maintenance, implementing updates, optimizing performance, and ensuring long-term usability. This continuous iteration allowed the platform to evolve alongside TDS’s growing digital presence while maintaining a high standard of functionality and accessibility.

title: Direct Focus
bodyHtml:
Direct Focus is one of the leading end-to-end marketing and communications agencies in Winnipeg. During my time with the company, I played a key role in redesigning and redeveloping their website, leading both the design and development efforts to modernize their digital presence.

This project involved a complete UI/UX overhaul, focusing on visual clarity, responsiveness, and performance optimization. I was responsible for designing custom icons, animations, and interactive elements to enhance user engagement while ensuring seamless front-end and back-end integration.

Collaborating with a new team at Direct Focus, I gained valuable insights into the Canadian digital marketing landscape and client expectations. This experience not only strengthened my ability to create high-impact marketing platforms but also reinforced the importance of design-driven development in crafting seamless and effective digital experiences.

title: Daover USA
bodyHtml:
As Daover expanded internationally with Daover USA, a strong and unified digital presence was essential. I led the design and development of both websites, ensuring a seamless experience across markets.

From logo design to brand identity, I provided strategic consulting to build a consistent and recognizable visual system. The websites were designed with modern UX/UI principles, focusing on clarity, performance, and adaptability across devices.

This project was more than just development—it was about creating a strong brand foundation that supports Daover’s growth in both local and global markets. The result is a cohesive and high-performing digital experience that reflects their innovation and ambition.
